case_title: ANDREA LISETTE CHICAS VS. WONDERSITTER LLC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,600.00 FILED BY CHICAS, ANDREA LISETTE AS TO DEFENDANT WONDERSITTER LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-21-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

STIPLATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHICAS, ANDREA LISETTE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-21-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-21-2017 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ELIZABETH ZAREH. PLAINTIFF ANDREA LISETTE CHICAS APPEARED. DEFENDANT WONDERSITTER LLC DID NOT APPEAR. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM ELIZABETH ZAREH, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-11-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WONDERSITTER LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-21-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHICAS, ANDREA LISETTE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONDERSITTER LLC $1,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,615.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
